items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning aim to improve penalty kill in Game of Eastern First Round
items.description:
TAMPA -- Brandon Hagel had some great news for the Tampa Bay Lightning and their fans on Monday.
“The sun came up this morning,” the forward said following practice at Benchmark International Arena.
Tampa Bay trails in the Eastern Conference First Round against the Montreal Canadiens heading into Game 2

items.headline: Mammoth Sean Durzi fined maximum for head-butting in Game 1 against Golden Knights
items.description: NEW YORK -- Utah Mammoth defenseman Sean Durzi has been fined $5,000, the maximum allowable under the Collective Bargaining Agreement, for head-butting Vegas Golden Knights defenseman Rasmus Andersson during Game 1 of the teams’ First Round series in Las Vegas on Sunday, April 19, the National Hockey League’s Department of

items.description:

items.headline: Logan Cooley on a mission with Utah Mammoth
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Logan Cooley did not ease into his Stanley Cup Playoff debut. The 21-year-old forward was the best player on the ice in the Utah Mammoth’s 4-2 loss to the Vegas Golden Knights in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at T-Mobile Arena on Sunday, showing

items.headline: Leon Draisaitl could play Game 1 for Edmonton against Anaheim
items.description:
EDMONTON -- Leon Draisaitl will be a game-time decision for the Edmonton Oilers in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round against the Anaheim Ducks at Rogers Place on Monday (10 p.m. ET; CBC, TVAS, SN, KCOP-13, ESPN2, Victory+).
The forward did not participate in an optional morning skate

items.headline: Baggie Day Buzz latest news from eliminated NHL teams April 20, 2026
items.description:
For 16 NHL teams, there are no Stanley Cup Playoffs. Instead, players are packing up their gear, reflecting on the season and looking toward the future, as well as front office members analyzing what went wrong.

items.headline: NHL EDGE stats behind Sabres Game 1 comeback against Bruins 2026
items.description: NHL.com's fantasy staff continues to cover the latest trends and storylines in the League through the lens of NHL EDGE puck and player tracker stats. Today, we look at key advanced metrics behind the Buffalo Sabres’ comeback win in Game 1 of the Eastern Conference First Round.

items.headline: Juraj Slafkovsky makes Montreal Canadiens history with Game 1 hat trick
items.description:
MONTREAL – Power forward Juraj Slafkovsky has punctuated Montreal Canadiens games all season with his strength, locomotive drive to the net and his superb finish, scoring 30 goals for the first time in his four-year NHL career.
On Sunday, that punctuation was a bold exclamation mark.
Slafkovsky became the first

items.headline: Fantasy hockey picks props projections for 2025-26 season
items.description: NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth eager to learn from loss in Stanley Cup Playoff debut
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- The Utah Mammoth missed a massive opportunity Sunday. They lost to the Vegas Golden Knights 4-2 at T-Mobile Arena in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round after blowing a 2-1 third-period lead.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth Vegas Golden Knights game 1 recap April 19 2026
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- Mark Stone and Nic Dowd scored 1:47 apart for the Vegas Golden Knights, who rallied in the third period for a 4-2 victory against the Utah Mammoth in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round at T-Mobile Arena on Sunday.
